hypothesisSignature: theorem linear_perturbation_automorphism_group_order_n4 : (simplegraph.autgroup (simplegraph.fromrel (fun (i j : fin 4) => i ≠ j ∧ ((i : ℕ) + (j : ℕ)) % 2 = 0))).card = 8

theorem cayley_graph_zmod5_2d_pert_is_k4_free : let q := 5; let n := 2; let p : mvpolynomial (fin n) (zmod q) := mvpolynomial.x 0 ^ 2 + mvpolynomial.x 1 ^ 2 + mvpolynomial.x 0 * mvpolynomial.x 1; let inst_q_prime : fact q.isprime := by { apply nat.prime_def_le_sqrt.mpr; decide }; let inst_q_ne_zero : nezero q := by { apply nezero.mk; decide }; let s_finset : finset ((fin n) → zmod q) := finset.univ.filter (fun v => finsqchar.quadraticchar (p.eval v) = 1); ¬ (addcommgroup.cayleygraph s_finset).haskclique 4 := by admit

theorem unit_sphere_graph_q5_d3_k4_free : (simplegraph.from_rel (v := { v : fin 3 → zmod 5 // finset.univ.sum (fun i => v i ^ 2) = 1 }) (fun x y => x.val ≠ y.val ∧ (finset.univ.sum (fun i => (x.val i - y.val i) ^ 2)) ∈ ((finset.univ : finset (zmod 5)).erase 0))).clique_number ≤ 3

theorem circle_pseudo_randomness_f13 : let f := zmod 13; let v : finset (f × f) := { (x, y) | x, y : f, x*x + y*y = 1 }; let q_val (u v : f × f) : f := (u.fst - v.fst)^2 + (u.snd - v.snd)^2; let s : finset f := { q_val u v | u ∈ v, v ∈ v, u ≠ v, q_val u v ≠ 0 }; let residues : finset f := s.filter (fun x => isquadraticresidue x); nat.card residues * 2 = nat.card s

def specificgraph14 : simplegraph (fin 14) := { adj := fun i j => i ≠ j ∧ i.val < 4 ∧ j.val < 4, symm := by { intros i j h, simp at h, rcases h with ⟨h_ne, h_i_lt_4, h_j_lt_4⟩, simp [h_ne.symm, h_j_lt_4, h_i_lt_4] } } theorem specific_graph_14_has_4_clique : (specificgraph14).cliqueset 4 ≠ ∅
theorem cayley_fq_c3_c5_k4_free (q : ℕ) [fact q.isprime] (hq_mod : q % 15 = 1) (hq_gt : q > 36) : (simplegraph.cayley (zmod q) (powerresidues q 3 ∪ powerresidues q 5)).cliquenumber ≤ 3
